stockExchangeRules.text: Stock Exchange and Central Depositary Rules

footer.disclaimer:
Armbrok is not responsible for the accuracy and reliability of the information and/or advertisements presented on the third party websites linked from this website and assumes no responsibility for the consequences arising from the use of the said information.

In case of any discrepancy between the information published in English and Russian, the Armenian version shall prevail.

Helpful links: cba.am, abcfinance.am, fininfo.am, fsm.am

Armbrok is regulated by the Central Bank of Republic of Armenia.

License Number: 10, issued on 04.11.2008.

notFound.title:
Oops!
Page Not Found 😕
notFound.description:
It looks like the page you’re looking for doesn’t exist or has been moved.
Please check the URL or head back to the homepage. We’re here to help
you find your way!

serverError.title: Something Went Wrong 😵
serverError.description:
We’re experiencing a server issue right now. Please try refreshing the page
or come back later. If the problem persists, contact support — we’re
working to fix it as soon as possible!

openAccount.title: Open account

nameInput.label: Your name
nameInput.secondErrorMessage: Name must be at least 4 characters long

phoneInput.label: Your phone number
phoneInput.secondErrorMessage: Please enter a valid phone number

emailInput.label: Your e-mail address
emailInput.secondErrorMessage: Please enter a valid email address

subjectInput.label: Subject
subjectInput.secondErrorMessage: Subject must be at least 4 characters long

messageInput.label: Message
messageInput.secondErrorMessage: Message must be at least 10 characters long

openAccount.checkbox: I hereby give my unconditional consent to the text of the public agreement «PERSONAL DATA PROTECTION POLICY» published on the official website of «ARMBROK OJSC», in the «Internal Regulations» section, to the extent of data processing, which is necessary to use these services.
openAccount.captcha:
This site is protected by reCAPTCHA, and the Google Privacy Policy
and Terms of Service apply.

successAccountModal.title:
Thank You
for Reaching Out!
successAccountModal.description:
We’ve received your message and will get back to you shortly.
Our team is reviewing your inquiry and will contact you within 24–48 hours.

errorModal.title:
Oops!
Something Went Wrong
errorModal.description: We were unable to send your message. Please check the entered data and try again. If the issue persists, contact us by phone or email.

cookiePanel.summary: We use third-party cookies in order to personalise your experience.
